song.title: See What A Morning
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D A/D G D/F# See, what a morning, gloriously bright . A Bm G D/F# G D/A A with the dawning of hope in Jerusalem . D A/D G D folded the grave clothes, tomb filled with light .A/C# Bm G D/F# G D/A A as the angels announce Christ is risen! . D G D/F# G D/F# See God's salvation plan, wrought in love, . G D/F# G D/A A D/F# borne in pain, paid in sacrifice, . G D/F# fulfilled in Christ, the Man, . G D/F# G D/A A D A for He lives: Christ is risen from the dead
[v2] . D A/D G D/F# See Mary weeping, "Where is he Laid"? . A Bm G D/F# G D/A A As in sorrow she turns from the empty tomb; . D A/D G D Hears a voice speaking, calling her name; .A/C# Bm G D/F# G D/A A It's the Master, the Lord raised to life again! . D G D/F# The voice that spans the years, . G D/F# G D/F# G D/A A D/F# Speaking life, stirring hope, bringing peace to us, . G D/F# Will sound till he appears, . G D/F# G D/A A D A For He lives, Christ is risen from the dead!
-!!
[v3] . D A/D G D/F# One with the Father, Ancient of Days, . A Bm G D/F# G D/A A Through the Spirit who clothes faith with certainty . D A/D G D Honour and blessing, glory and praise .A/C# Bm G D/F# G D/A A To the King crowned with power and authority! . D G D/F# And we are raised with Him, . G D/F# G D/F# G D/A A D/F# Death is dead, love has won, Christ has conquered; . G D/F# And we shall reign with Him . G D/F# G D/A A D A For He lives, Christ is risen from the dead!﻿
